verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $45.10 CAD. Core is 10.2% vs 40% target — $1,871 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.7%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above zone; PLTR above no-chase; SOFI above zone.

warnings: UNDER-DIVERSIFIED: XEQT core is 10.2% vs 40% target (29.8pp below). Prioritize funding core.
THEME CONCENTRATION: Single-theme (AI/power/nuclear) exposure at 89.7% — above 50% threshold.
SOFI: only $0.98 CAD room to cap — too small for a meaningful buy.
